name: node-decamelize
title: node-decamelize
summary: convert a camelized string into a lowercased one with a custom separator
description:
convert a camelized string into a lowercased one with a custom separator
This module converts a camelized string into a lowercased one with a
custom separator. For example: unicornRainbow → unicorn_rainbow
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-decamelize because convert a camelized string into a lowercased one with a custom separator.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-decamelize as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-decamelize with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-decamelize --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
